description: Result payload for gc pack registry show.

schema_version.description: Version of this command result schema.

registry.description: Registry that provided this pack entry.

name.description: Pack name as published in the registry catalog.

description.description: Pack description from the registry catalog.

source_kind.description: Source type for this pack entry.

latest.description: Highest non-withdrawn semver release known for this pack.

ref.description: Publisher-facing git ref for the release.

commit.description: Full resolved git commit SHA for the release.

hash.description: SHA-256 canonical pack tree digest for the release.

description.description: Release description from the registry catalog.

withdrawn.description: Whether this release has been withdrawn for new resolutions.

withdrawn_reason.description: Optional reason explaining why the release was withdrawn.
